segments.text: IIT Bombay just launched a fivemonth generative AI certificate. And [music]
this one isn't for curiosity, it's for capability. What companies want now are people who can build, adapt, [music] and deploy Gen AI systems securely at scale
inside real workflows. That's exactly what this program [music] is designed for. It's built by IIT Bombay faculty at
the Technoccraftraft Center for Applied Artificial Intelligence and delivered in partnership with great learning. Here's what you actually learn. [music] You
start with fundamentals, AI and large language models. Then move into prompt engineering, R A and [music] model
adaptation using proprietary data. And at the end, you earn a certificate [music] of completion from IIT Bombay.
Here's the bigger picture. Gen AI is moving from interesting [music] to mission critical. And the gap between people who use AI tools and people who
build AI systems is widening fast. This program [music] is clearly built for people who want to be on the builder side of
